html:
Exclusive to:  

The Old Boot can be snagged from Flotsam by using a Fishing Rod. It can be given to the Pig King for four Gold Nuggets. When given an Old Boot, Wolly will drop five Crimson Feathers, tell a part of Wolly's Riddle, then fly away.

The Old Boot can be spawned into the game with the code "sunken_boat_trinket_5".

×4

Trinket 17

Exclusive to:  

In the Shipwrecked DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in Trawl Net. Despite having the same appearance, they are actually two different items, they cannot be stacked, and they function and acquire differently.

In the Hamlet DLC, the Old Boot can spawn in a Bandit Stash.

×6

×5

×3

Trivia

  • In DST Old Boot can be found on Abigail's "Haunt At" icon.

Gallery

  • Old Boot card from Wolly's Riddle.

Exclusive to:
“If only I had another!”
–Wilson
“Not my size.”
–Willow
“Tough leather is hard to chew.”
–Wolfgang
“What a cliche.”
–Wendy
“IT IS MISSING A CRITICAL COMPONENT”
–WX-78
“It is an old boot. I wonder where the other is?”
–Wickerbottom
“Not my size, that.”
–Woodie
“It was probably hideous before soaking in bilgewater.”
–Maxwell
“I'm afraid it is not my size.”
–Wagstaff
“Not my size.”
–Wigfrid
“We'll boil this if we get desperate.”
–Webber
“I've already got a pair of boots.”
–Walani
“Not my size.”
–Warly
“I already got one good boot.”
–Woodlegs
“IT FIT WILBA NAUGHT”
–Wilba
“(sniff, sniff) Whoo-wee!”
–Wormwood
“It's treasures like this that make all the hardship worthwhile.”
–Wheeler
The Old Boot can be snagged from Flotsam by using a Fishing Rod. It can be given to the Pig King for four Gold Nuggets. When given an Old Boot, Wolly will drop five Crimson Feathers, tell a part of Wolly's Riddle, then fly away.
The Old Boot can be spawned into the game with the code "sunken_boat_trinket_5".

In the Shipwrecked DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in Trawl Net. Despite having the same appearance, they are actually two different items, they cannot be stacked, and they function and acquire differently.
In the Hamlet DLC, the Old Boot can spawn in a Bandit Stash.
